APPELLATE COURT CALENDAR OF JAN-24-2020 - APPEAL OF CRIMINAL JUDGMENT AFFIRMED IN PART (COUNTS 1 AND 2) AND REVERSED IN PART (THE JURY'S TRUE FINDING THAT APPELLANT WAS CONVICTED IN 2010 OF DRIVING WITH A BLOOD ALCOHOL CONTENT OF 0.08 IS REVERSED).
